## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss content strategy, website updates, and new revenue generation tactics for Dimmo](https://fathom.video/share/wE5JsgBUysabta-vj_gPk9Qt-sX_yZjQ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Agreed on summarized + detailed content format for product pages](https://fathom.video/share/wE5JsgBUysabta-vj_gPk9Qt-sX_yZjQ?tab=summary&timestamp=33.0)
  - [Website restructuring with new subfolders and 301 redirects in progress](https://fathom.video/share/wE5JsgBUysabta-vj_gPk9Qt-sX_yZjQ?tab=summary&timestamp=61.0)
  - [SEO performance showing positive trends; focus on internal linking next](https://fathom.video/share/wE5JsgBUysabta-vj_gPk9Qt-sX_yZjQ?tab=summary&timestamp=913.0)
  - [New revenue strategies: increased demo days, paper lead model, AI-powered product comparisons](https://fathom.video/share/wE5JsgBUysabta-vj_gPk9Qt-sX_yZjQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1429.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Updates

  - [Opted for summarized version with expandable detailed breakdown](https://fathom.video/share/wE5JsgBUysabta-vj_gPk9Qt-sX_yZjQ?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)
  - [Summarized version includes: company overview, pricing, benefits, features, integrations, security, support, target audience, reviews](https://fathom.video/share/wE5JsgBUysabta-vj_gPk9Qt-sX_yZjQ?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
  - [Need to refine presentation of user reviews/expert opinions section](https://fathom.video/share/wE5JsgBUysabta-vj_gPk9Qt-sX_yZjQ?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)
  - [Migration of articles to new subfolders (best software, software features, software alternatives)](https://fathom.video/share/wE5JsgBUysabta-vj_gPk9Qt-sX_yZjQ?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)
  - [Aiming to complete 30 product review articles by next week](https://fathom.video/share/wE5JsgBUysabta-vj_gPk9Qt-sX_yZjQ?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)

### Website Development Tasks

  - [Lucas to create new subfolders and implement 301 redirects](https://fathom.video/share/wE5JsgBUysabta-vj_gPk9Qt-sX_yZjQ?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Need Loom videos on:](https://fathom.video/share/wE5JsgBUysabta-vj_gPk9Qt-sX_yZjQ?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
    1.  How to publish articles in specific subfolders
    2.  How to publish summarized and detailed versions in new product CMS

### SEO Performance

  - [25 clicks this week (up from 9-10 in previous weeks)](https://fathom.video/share/wE5JsgBUysabta-vj_gPk9Qt-sX_yZjQ?tab=summary&timestamp=913.0)
  - [\~50,000 impressions, stable week-over-week](https://fathom.video/share/wE5JsgBUysabta-vj_gPk9Qt-sX_yZjQ?tab=summary&timestamp=917.0)
  - [Top performing pages: CRM features, Common Room alternatives, Hunter.io alternatives](https://fathom.video/share/wE5JsgBUysabta-vj_gPk9Qt-sX_yZjQ?tab=summary&timestamp=935.0)
  - [Ranking positions improving (e.g., 4th for Common Room alternatives)](https://fathom.video/share/wE5JsgBUysabta-vj_gPk9Qt-sX_yZjQ?tab=summary&timestamp=981.0)
  - [Internal linking implementation pending subfolder restructuring](https://fathom.video/share/wE5JsgBUysabta-vj_gPk9Qt-sX_yZjQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1093.0)

### Content Focus Areas

  - [Prioritizing sales-related tools and subcategories](https://fathom.video/share/wE5JsgBUysabta-vj_gPk9Qt-sX_yZjQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1339.0)
  - [Key focus: AI/SDR, contact database, data intelligence/signals, sales enablement](https://fathom.video/share/wE5JsgBUysabta-vj_gPk9Qt-sX_yZjQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1339.0)

### New Revenue Generation Strategies

  - [Increasing demo days from 1 to 4 per month](https://fathom.video/share/wE5JsgBUysabta-vj_gPk9Qt-sX_yZjQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1426.0)
  - [Implementing paid ads to drive registrations ($3k ad spend per demo day)](https://fathom.video/share/wE5JsgBUysabta-vj_gPk9Qt-sX_yZjQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1444.0)
  - [Targeting 250-300 registrants per demo day](https://fathom.video/share/wE5JsgBUysabta-vj_gPk9Qt-sX_yZjQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1515.0)
  - [Exploring paper lead model for gated content](https://fathom.video/share/wE5JsgBUysabta-vj_gPk9Qt-sX_yZjQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1510.0)
  - [Developing AI-powered product comparison feature for website](https://fathom.video/share/wE5JsgBUysabta-vj_gPk9Qt-sX_yZjQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1585.0)
